DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-18-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS DEFENDANT FRESH ORGANICS, INC.'S A DELAWARE CORPORATION DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT.
RULING: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING -- SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party to prepare order. Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-01-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jaime C. Uziel, Esq., The Sheppard, Rosen Law Firm, 415-296-0900, for defendant and moving party Jane Allen
Zesara C. Chan, Esq., Shartsis, Friese, LLP, 415-421-6500, for plaintiff and and opposing party Fresh Organic, Inc.

Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JANE ALLEN, KIMBALL ALLEN and REAL FOOD COMPANY, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT as to the 7th cause of action is sustained as to 3RD REQUEST for declaratory relief, and stricken as to the 5TH REQUEST. Plaintiffs have 10 days LEAVE TO AMEND. Defendants have 15 days from service of amended complaint to answer. Order signed. Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG/JT)
